indexPage.badge: All-in-one platform to sell more online
indexPage.heroSubtitle: Nexsell is the all-in-one platform for online sellers and dropshippers: generate AIDA landings, professional banners and publish to Shopify with a simple credit system. No code, no designers.
indexPage.problemTitle: Selling online shouldn't take you weeks
indexPage.problemSubtitle: 80% of stores don't convert because their landing was built like a catalog, not like a sales machine.

problems.text: You spend hours writing copy and arranging blocks
problems.detail: Hooks, benefits, objections, FAQs, CTAs… every landing is a project of its own.
And you still have to coordinate design, copy and dev separately.
Without AIDA structure, social proof or urgency, your visitors leave without buying.

problems.text: Pushing it all into Shopify is painful
problems.detail: Pasting HTML, tweaking Liquid, breaking the theme… you end up needing a dev.

solutions.text: Full AIDA landing generated in 60 seconds
solutions.detail: Hero, problem, solution, social proof, offer, guarantee, FAQ and CTA — all done.

solutions.text: Pro 'Product-First' banners with your real product
solutions.detail: AI respects real colors, textures and shape — no generic invented imagery.
Native OAuth connection: export as page, Liquid section or downloadable ZIP.
Pick products from the catalog and generate ads + landing in the same flow.

indexPage.benefitsTitle: Everything you need to scale your store
indexPage.benefitsSubtitle: A complete ecosystem: AI copywriting, ad-ready banners, native Shopify export and real-time analytics.

benefits.title: 7-block AIDA landings
benefits.desc: Proven structure (Attention → Interest → Desire → Action) with hooks, social proof, objections, FAQ and bundles.

benefits.title: Product-First AI banners
benefits.desc: Generate 1080×1920 banner packs for Instagram, TikTok and Meta Ads using your real product.

benefits.title: Built-in Dropi catalog
benefits.desc: Import winning products from the Dropi catalog and generate ads ready to sell in one step.

benefits.title: Native Shopify export
benefits.desc: Connect your store via OAuth and publish as a page, Liquid section or download the full ZIP.

benefits.title: Multi-language & multi-currency
benefits.desc: Spanish, English and Portuguese. Prices localized automatically based on your audience country.

benefits.title: Analytics & versioning
benefits.desc: Views, referrers and up to 20 automatic versions per landing — roll back any time.

indexPage.howTitle: From idea to sale in 4 steps
indexPage.howSubtitle: No code, no templates, no waiting for the designer.

steps.title: Upload your product
steps.desc: Name, price, category, audience and at least one photo. Done in 30 seconds.

steps.title: AI builds the strategy
steps.desc: Our 3-step pipeline picks the angle, writes the blocks and runs a quality check before showing them.

steps.title: Edit & pick your style
steps.desc: Tweak text inline, choose a visual theme (Minimal, Bold, Clean, Warm) and add AI banners instantly.

steps.title: Publish to Shopify or download
steps.desc: Native Shopify connection or export as a ZIP with ready-to-upload HTML/Liquid.

indexPage.examplesSubtitle: Real banners and landings generated by Nexsell users.

indexPage.imageRequired: We need your image to generate a real landing.
indexPage.demoUsedMsg: You already used your free demo.
indexPage.plansTitle: Plans built to grow with you
indexPage.plansSubtitle: Each plan gives you a monthly credit pool to spend on landings, banners and AI images. No contracts, cancel anytime.

plans.name: Free
features: No-account demo to try it out

plans.name: Starter
features: ≈ 20 text landings or 8 with AI images

plans.name: Pro
features: ≈ 100 text landings or 40 with AI images

faqs.q: Do I need to know how to code or design?
faqs.a: No. Nexsell generates copy, blocks and banners automatically. You just upload your product and pick a style.

faqs.q: How do I connect my Shopify store?
faqs.a: We have native OAuth connection (no manual tokens). From the editor you publish in one click as a page, Liquid section or download the full ZIP.
The interface is available in Spanish, English and Portuguese. Landings are generated in the language you choose and prices are localized to your audience country.

We use Google Gemini with a 'Product-First' approach: the AI takes your real photo and respects colors, texture and shape. We generate packs of 7 vertical pieces (1080×1920) ready for Instagram, TikTok and Meta Ads.
A curated library of winning dropshipping products. Starter and Pro plans can import a product and generate the landing and ads in a single flow.
Yes. Inline editor (click and type), block reordering, visual theme switching and up to 20 automatic saved versions — roll back any time.

faqs.q: Can I try without an account?
faqs.a: Yes. You can generate 1 demo landing without signing up to see the result with your own product. To publish and export you need a free account.

Every AI action (generate landing, banner, image, etc.) deducts credits from your monthly pool. The pool refills automatically every 30 days based on your plan. If you run out, you can upgrade or wait for the next cycle.
No. You pay monthly via Mercado Pago (international cards accepted). Cancel anytime from your dashboard and keep access until the period ends.

indexPage.ctaTitle: Your next sale starts with a landing that converts
indexPage.ctaSubtitle: Join the sellers who stopped fighting templates and started publishing landings that actually sell.
